title: Research process overview
author: Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This research process overview describes necessary and recommended steps that researchers may need to follow before, during and after the research project. These steps are described with the rationale behind the step, and the place where a researcher may find support.
steps_raw: This research process overview describes necessary and recommended steps that researchers may need to follow before, during and after the research project. These steps are described with the rationale behind the step, and the place where a researcher may find support.
